campaign.title: Erdős Minimum Overlap
campaign.problem: Find partitions of [n] into A, B with |A|=|B| that minimize the maximum overlap count maxk |{(a,b): a+b=k}|. Established lower bound 0.380926. We're searching for constructions and SLPs that approach it from above.

timeline.author: reviewer
timeline.text: Milestone 1: three baselines evaluated. Random partitions plateau at 0.49; SLP variants at 256/512 block size are below 0.45. Lattice packing gets 0.40 but is rigid. Pivoting away from random construction.

timeline.author: reviewer
timeline.text: Milestone 2: cross of slp-1024 and lattice-pack yields slp-lattice — 0.382, now best-in-class. The lattice provides structure that SLP alone misses, while SLP refines lattice's rigidity.

timeline.author: reviewer
timeline.text: Milestone 3: annealing on top of slp-lattice gives slp-lattice-anneal at 0.38087, within 0.0001 of the conjectured optimum. Diminishing returns from here without a structural insight.

timeline.author: wwang2
timeline.text: **Post-target exploration** — orbit 012 tested phase-gated spot printing (0.10 daughter / 0.04 parent) to boost heredity. **Result: regression** to 0.5345 (vs 011's 0.5584). Heredity didn't materially move (0.27 → 0.26); seed 3 lost one daughter. Lesson: CLIP/DINOv2 respond to shape, not texture strength. Orbit 011 remains the campaign winner.

orbits.name: slp-lattice
orbits.strategy: cross: SLP seeded from lattice packing

orbits.name: spectral-relax
orbits.strategy: spectral relaxation of the SLP objective

orbits.name: tabu-search
orbits.strategy: tabu search starting from current best

orbits.name: 012-daughter-phase-heredity
orbits.strategy: Moderate spot-print strength applied only post-fission to boost daughter heredity

issue_comments.author: wwang2
issue_comments.body:
## Eval Check — REGRESSION (Dead-End)
**Measured:** 0.5345 (vs orbit 011: 0.5584, -0.024)

| Seed | composite | daughters | t4 | heredity | vs 011 |
|------|-----------|-----------|-----|----------|--------|
| 1 | 0.5759 | 4 | 0.6501 | 0.3002 | +0.006 |
| 2 | 0.5469 | 3 | 0.6211 | 0.2422 | +0.003 |
| 3 | 0.4808 | 2 | 0.4650 | 0.2634 | **-0.081** |

**Lesson:** Stronger daughter-phase print (0.10 vs 0.04) barely moved heredity (0.27 → 0.26) but destabilized seed 3 (3→2 daughters). CLIP/DINOv2 respond to shape, not texture strength.
